backend/main.mo: Motoko actor storing expenses in a Map and providing CRUD operations plus category, date, and total aggregation queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping Android packaging, authentication, and documentation features to their related files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Collection of summarized descriptions for numerous frontend files including screens, components, hooks, utilities, and styles.
frontend/ANDROID_APK.md: Guide explaining how to build, sign, and distribute the Android APK, including environment setup and troubleshooting.
frontend/android/app/src/main/AndroidMan: Android manifest configuring app permissions, main activity, deep-link handling, and network security settings.
frontend/android/app/src/main/java/com/e: Simple Capacitor BridgeActivity subclass serving as the app’s Android entry point.
frontend/android/app/src/main/res/xml/ne: Network security configuration allowing cleartext traffic for development and defining trusted production domains.
frontend/android/variables.gradle: Gradle variable definitions specifying SDK versions and AndroidX library versions.
frontend/ARCHITECTURE.md: Documentation describing the frontend architecture, design principles, component structure, and backend interface.
frontend/capacitor.config.ts: Capacitor configuration defining app ID, web directory, Android settings, and optional server URL.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining OKLCH design tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file loading the main React entry point and defining basic metadata.
frontend/README.md: High-level project overview and development instructions for the React + Capacitor frontend.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the app’s theme provider and TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, adding expenses, listing expenses, and settings.
frontend/src/components/charts/MonthlySp: Renders a monthly spending line chart using daily expense data, showing empty-state messaging when no data exists.
frontend/src/components/charts/WeeklySpe: Displays a weekly bar chart of daily spending based on date labels, with a fallback when all values are zero.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Catego: Shows sorted expense totals by category with percentage bars, including loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Totals: Displays total spending and average per day, with skeleton placeholders shown while data loads.
frontend/src/components/expenses/DeleteE: Confirmation dialog for deleting an expense, calling a delete hook and showing success or error toasts.
frontend/src/components/expenses/EditExp: Dialog for editing an expense using ExpenseForm and triggering the update hook on submit.
frontend/src/components/expenses/Expense: Provides time-period and category filters for expense lists using dropdown selections.
Form for creating or editing an expense with validation for amount, category, and date, supporting optional notes.
Displays a sortable expense table with edit/delete actions and loading/empty states.
Defines the main app layout with header, footer, routing outlet, and Capacitor initialization.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Renders primary navigation buttons with active state detection.
frontend/src/constants/expenseCategories: Exports a list of predefined expense categories with values and labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useExpenses.ts: Provides hooks to fetch, create, update, and delete expenses via the backend actor with react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity context, login handling, and identity persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AddExpenseScreen.ts: Screen for adding a new expense using a form and redirecting after creation.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard displaying weekly or monthly spending insights with charts and aggregated data.
frontend/src/screens/ExpenseListScreen.t: Displays expenses with filter controls and applies date/category filtering using custom hooks and utilities.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Provides UI for appearance settings including theme switching and an about section.
frontend/src/utils/aggregations.ts: Contains helpers to total expenses and aggregate them by day or category.
frontend/src/utils/capacitorAuthBridge.t: Implements Capacitor-based Internet Identity auth flow with dynamic plugin loading, deep link handling, and browser control.
frontend/src/utils/capacitorRuntime.ts: Provides runtime detection and optional loading of Capacitor, plus helpers for platform checks and external link behavior.
frontend/src/utils/dateRanges.ts: Generates week/month ranges, day labels, and applies date/category filtering to expenses.
frontend/src/utils/expenseMapping.ts: Maps amounts between UI and backend formats and includes formatting helpers for currency, dates, and notes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, themes, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, existing features, and new feature requests related to Android APK support.
